mapper.sql: fdqgd.id, fdqgd.group_id as fdqg_id, fdqgd.label, fdqgd.query_table, fdqgd.field, fdqgd.field_type, fdqgd.field_type_desc, fdqgd.jdbc_type, fdqgd.operator_group_id as fdqog_id, fdqgd.component, fdqgd.component_attributes, fdqgd.list_type, fdqgd.list_attributes, fdqgd.regular_expression, fdqgd.special_sql, fdqgd.sort, fdqgd.enabled_flag, fdqgd.create_time, fdqgd.create_by, fdqgd.update_time, fdqgd.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_fdqg_id, ${tAlias}.label as ${tAlias}_label, ${tAlias}.query_table as ${tAlias}_query_table, ${tAlias}.field as ${tAlias}_field, ${tAlias}.field_type as ${tAlias}_field_type, ${tAlias}.field_type_desc as ${tAlias}_field_type_desc, ${tAlias}.jdbc_type as ${tAlias}_jdbc_type, ${tAlias}.operator_group_id as ${tAlias}_fdqog_id, ${tAlias}.component as ${tAlias}_component, ${tAlias}.component_attributes as ${tAlias}_component_attributes, ${tAlias}.list_type as ${tAlias}_list_type, ${tAlias}.list_attributes as ${tAlias}_list_attributes, ${tAlias}.regular_expression as ${tAlias}_regular_expression, ${tAlias}.special_sql as ${tAlias}_special_sql, ${tAlias}.sort as ${tAlias}_sort, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
, fdqog.name fdqog_name from fnd_dynamic_query_group_detail fdqgd left outer join fnd_dynamic_query_operator_group fdqog on fdqgd.operator_group_id = fdqog.id and fdqog.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_dynamic_query_group_detail (group_id, label, query_table, field, field_type, field_type_desc, jdbc_type, operator_group_id, component, component_attributes, list_type, list_attributes, regular_expression, special_sql, sort, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{dynamicQueryGroup.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{queryTable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldTypeDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jdbcType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dynamicQueryOperatorGroup.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{component,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{componentAttributes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listAttributes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regularExpression,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_dynamic_query_group_detail set group_id = #{dynamicQueryGroup.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, label = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, query_table = #{queryTable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field = #{field,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field_type = #{fieldType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field_type_desc = #{fieldTypeDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jdbc_type = #{jdbcType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_group_id = #{dynamicQueryOperatorGroup.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, component = #{component,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, component_attributes = #{componentAttributes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, list_type = #{listType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, list_attributes = #{listAttributes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regular_expression = #{regularExpression,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, special_sql = #{specialSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
